name: regenai
description: RegenAI — four-layer Shopify Plus commerce platform (storefront + custom app + Shopify Functions + data/ML). Hydrogen on Oxygen, Remix on Cloudflare Workers, Rust/WASM functions, Supabase pgvector + BigQuery + dbt.
author: Zahidul Islam <muhammadzahidulislam2222@gmail.com>

scripts.postinstall: node -e "try{require('child_process').execSync('npm rebuild lightningcss',{stdio:'inherit'})}catch(e){console.warn('[postinstall] npm rebuild lightningcss skipped:',e.message)}"
